summary: Two partner check-ins today — CIEE at 10:00 AM and Greenheart CAP at 11:30 AM; CTI BKK Financial Meeting was canceled. Overnight Putu Astra responded on the J1 Visa Status 2026 thread and is pressing TUI/Palece/Myanmar for candidate and approval data. Alliance Abroad confirmed OTC students received AAG Roadshow portal invitations; Zoho CRM J1 module returned an empty payload (data pending).
